verses.2: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shayon AAajeebun
verses.3: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban thalika rajAAun baAAeedun
verses.4: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusu alardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeethun
verses.5: Bal kaththaboo bialhaqqi lamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareejin
verses.6: Afalam yanthuroo ila alssamai fawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannaha wama laha min furoojin
verses.7: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin baheejin
verses.9: Wanazzalna mina alssamai maan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatin wahabba alhaseedi
verses.11: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyayna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooju
verses.12: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waashabu alrrassi wathamoodu
verses.14: Waashabu alaykati waqawmu tubbaAAin kullun kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa waAAeedi
verses.15: AfaAAayeena bialkhalqi alawwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeedin
verses.16: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana wanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi min habli alwareedi
verses.17: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyani AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali qaAAeedun
verses.18: Ma yalfithu min qawlin illa ladayhi raqeebun AAateedun
verses.19: Wajaat sakratu almawti bialhaqqi thalika ma kunta minhu taheedu
verses.20: Wanufikha fee alssoori thalika yawmu alwaAAeedi
verses.21: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha saiqun washaheedun
verses.22: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hatha fakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasaruka alyawma hadeedun
verses.23: Waqala qareenuhu hatha ma ladayya AAateedun
verses.24: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarin AAaneedin
verses.26: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabi alshshadeedi
verses.27: Qala qareenuhu rabbana ma atghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalin baAAeedin
verses.28: Qala la takhtasimoo ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bialwaAAeedi
verses.29: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wama ana bithallamin lilAAabeedi
verses.30: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqoolu hal min mazeedin
verses.32: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulli awwabin hafeethin
verses.33: Man khashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneebin
verses.35: Lahum ma yashaoona feeha waladayna mazeedun
verses.36: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi hal min maheesin
verses.37: Inna fee thalika lathikra liman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa alssamAAa wahuwa shaheedun
verses.38: Walaqad khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma fee sittati ayyamin wama massana min lughoobin
verses.39: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla alghuroobi
verses.41: WaistamiAA yawma yunadi almunadi min makanin qareebin
verses.42: Yawma yasmaAAoona alssayhata bialhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooji
verses.43: Inna nahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wailayna almaseeru
verses.44: Yawma tashaqqaqu alardu AAanhum siraAAan thalika hashrun AAalayna yaseerun
verses.45: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona wama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bialqurani man yakhafu waAAeedi
